heading: Establishment of pierhead or bulkhead lines in Newport Harbor, California
label: 424 Establishment of pierhead or bulkhead lines in Newport Harbor, California
text: The Secretary of the Army is authorized and directed to fix and establish pierhead and bulkhead lines, either or both, at Newport Harbor, California, in accordance with plan dated United States Engineer Office, Los Angeles, California, , and entitled “Newport Bay, California”, showing harbor lines, beyond which no piers, wharfs, bulkheads, or other works shall be extended or deposit made, except under such regulations as shall be prescribed from time to time by the Secretary of the Army.March 25, 1913
notes: CodificationSection is from act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1916”.July 27, 1916
